case_title: NIALL BATTSON et al VS. DANIEL O'NEILL

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING GRANTED. -JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN M. MILEFF-
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-10-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS ONLY. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN FILED BY BATTSON, NIALL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BATTSON, NIALL ABRAHAM, VIJOY ALEXANDER, MARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O'NEILL, DANIEL $1,095.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,125.00, THIS AMOUNT REPRESENTS $220.00 FOR ELECTRICAL WORK ON CEILING LIGHT FIXTURE, $125.00 FOR CARPET CLEANING. DEFENDANT AGREED $600.00 CHARGED FOR LAST MONTH'S RENT WAS IMPROPERLY DEDUCTED, AND $150.00 FOR GENERAL CLEANING FOR WHICH NO RECEIPTS WERE PROVIDED. THE REMAINING AMOUNTS ARE NOT RECOVERABLE AS THEY ARE EITHER NOT LEGALLY SUPPORTED OR SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE WAS NOT PROVIDED BY PLAINTIFF TO SUBSTANTIATE THEIR CLAIMS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT O'NEILL, DANIEL
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF ABRAHAM, VIJOY
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT O'NEILL, DANIEL
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-10-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2009 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,450.00 FILED BY BATTSON, NIALL ABRAHAM, VIJOY ALEXANDER, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT O'NEILL, DANIEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-20-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-10-2009 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
